What we build

Projects

Active products, custom tooling, and retired open-source projects from RePass Cloud.

Active

Active products

Active · SaaS Platform

Cinturon360

The operational control layer for organisations that need to manage complexity across customers, partners, and teams. Multi-tenant SaaS with Microsoft Entra ID integration, role-based permissions, delegated administration, and audit logging.

.NET Azure Entra ID Multi-tenant
Visit Cinturon360
Active · SaaS Platform

Aethon

Hiring intelligence platform connecting verified employers, trusted recruiters, and job seekers in a transparent, AI-backed marketplace.

.NET Blazor PostgreSQL AI
Visit Aethon
Custom work

Bespoke tooling & automation

Beyond named products, RePass Cloud designs and builds custom tools, automation systems, and operational software for enterprise customers. This includes cloud infrastructure tooling, Microsoft 365 identity automation, finance workflow systems, FinOps platforms, PowerShell modules, and Windows utilities.

View case studies
Open source

Retired projects

These projects were built and operated by RePass Cloud and have since been retired. All are available open source on GitHub. No hosted services or support are provided.

Retired · Open Source

LunaVPN

Privacy-focused VPN service built on the WireGuard protocol with dedicated isolated instances.

GitHub
Retired · Open Source

OptechX

SaaS platform for building custom Windows Standard Operating Environment images for enterprise deployment.

GitHub
Retired · Open Source

WanderConnect

App concept for discovering local experiences and planning memorable outings.

GitHub
Retired · Open Source

TigerGrab 「とらグラブ」

Windows utility for downloading and preserving online videos for personal archiving.

GitHub
Retired · Open Source

CurseDelete

Cross-platform command-line utility for recursively deleting directories at high speed across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

GitHub
Retired · Open Source

CveInfo

Command-line utility for querying CVE vulnerability information for security operations and patch management workflows.

GitHub
All repos on GitHub
R RePass Cloud

Enterprise software & cloud automation

Built in Sydney, Australia. Engineering-led software for organisations that need production-grade tools.
